lessons.title: Peeking Inside: `cat` and `less`
lessons.description: Learn to dump file contents to the screen and navigate large files like a pro.

lessons.title: The Beginning and The End: `head` and `tail`
lessons.description: Extract the first or last lines of a file. Essential for log analysis.

lessons.title: The Needle Finder: Introduction to `grep`
lessons.description: Search for text patterns inside files. The hacker's most-used tool.

lessons.title: `grep` Mastery: Options and Context
lessons.description: Control case sensitivity, show line numbers, and get surrounding context.

lessons.title: Regular Expressions: The Superpower
lessons.description: Go beyond literal text. Match patterns with wildcards, anchors, and character classes.

lessons.title: Chaining Commands: Pipes and Redirection
lessons.description: Combine `cat`, `grep`, and other tools to build powerful data processing pipelines.
